case_title: DIANA GREER VS. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUANA THOMAS, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC.
